game_info.title: Bird Siege
game_info.concept: drag to aim and power the slingshot, release to launch, and tap the bird mid-flight to activate its special skill. Monetization includes in-app purchases for gems (premium currency), used to acquire additional bird cards, spells, or lives, alongside loot boxes for random rewards and optional rewarded video ads.
game_info.description: Launch birds from a slingshot to destroy enemy structures and defeat pigs! Pull back on the slingshot to aim and set power, then release to launch your bird. Each bird has a unique special ability that activates when you press SPACE mid-flight. Destroy all pigs to win the level. Earn gems to unlock new bird types with different abilities. Complete levels efficiently to maximize your score and gem rewards!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Adjust slingshot aim angle
- Arrow Keys (Down/Up): Adjust slingshot power
- SPACE: Launch bird (when aiming) OR Activate bird's special ability (mid-flight)
- Z: Cycle through available bird types before launching
- ENTER: Start game from start screen
- ESC: Pause/Unpause game
- R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing the complete win condition by destroying all pigs on the level. This validates the core game loop, collision detection, physics, and victory condition.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Aim at optimal angles to hit structures and pigs. Use bird special abilities at the right moment for maximum damage. Launch multiple birds if needed until all pigs are eliminated.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: All pigs should be destroyed, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test is successful when gameState.gamePhase becomes "GAME_OVER_WIN" and all pigs are removed from the game.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing bird special abilities by activating them mid-flight. This validates that each bird type's unique ability functions correctly and impacts gameplay.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Launch birds and activate special abilities at various flight points. Test each bird type's ability (split shot, speed boost, bomb) to verify they work as intended.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Special abilities should activate correctly, causing appropriate effects (splitting, acceleration, explosion). The test succeeds when abilities trigger and affect the game world as designed.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing movement and aiming mechanics by adjusting angle and power. This validates the slingshot controls and trajectory preview system.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Cycle through different angles and power levels using arrow keys. Launch birds at various trajectories to test the aiming system and physics accuracy.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Slingshot angle and power should change smoothly. Bird trajectories should match the preview. Test succeeds when controls respond correctly and birds follow predicted paths.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing collision detection and physics by launching birds at structures. This validates that objects interact realistically and destructible elements break appropriately.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Launch birds directly at structures and pigs. Observe collision responses, damage application, and structural collapse physics.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Collisions should register correctly, structures should break realistically, and pigs should be eliminated on sufficient impact. Test succeeds when all collision mechanics work without errors.
TEST_4.description: Testing collision detection and physics by launching birds at structures. This validates that objects interact realistically and destructible elements break appropriately.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing the gem economy and bird unlocking system. This validates the progression mechanics and reward system.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Complete levels to earn gems. Attempt to unlock new bird types using accumulated gems. Verify that unlocked birds become available for use.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Gems should be awarded based on performance. Bird unlocks should work correctly and new birds should be usable. Test succeeds when progression system functions as intended.
